fields in a configurable aggregation table",description:"Auto-detects every field on the worksheet. Pick which fields to include, choose an aggregation function per measure, then export the result to a formatted Excel file in one click.",features:["Auto field detection","SUM/AVG/MIN/MAX/COUNT","Excel export","Grouping & totals"],apiVersion:"1.1+",category:"Dashboard Extension",status:"stable",color:"hsl(142, 71%, 45%)"},{id:"drill-down",href:"/extensions/drill-down",icon:Uf,name:"Drill Down",tagline:"Hierarchical dimension table trended by date",description:"Select a primary dimension and up to 2 drill-down levels, pick a single measure to aggregate, and optionally trend by any date field with MM/DD/YY, MM/YY, YYYY, or Quarter/Year grouping.",features:["3-level drill-down","Trend by date","Subtotals & grand total","Excel export"],apiVersion:"1.7+",category:"Viz Extension",status:"stable",color:"hsl(217, 91%, 60%)"},{id:"data-table",href:"/extensions/data-table",icon:B3,name:"Data Table",tagline:"Interactive data grid for worksheet data",description:"A fully featured, sortable, filterable, and exportable data table that renders live worksheet data from your Tableau dashboard.",features:["Sort & filter","CSV export","Pagination","Live data binding"],apiVersion:"1.10+",category:"Dashboard Extension",status:"development",color:"hsl(213, 84%, 36%)"},{id:"sankey",href:"/extensions/sankey",icon:T3,name:"Sankey Diagram",tagline:"Flow visualization with D3-powered Sankey",description:"A high-performance Sankey diagram powered by D3.js that visualizes flow data from your Tableau worksheet.",features:["Auto data binding","SVG export","Hover tooltips","Responsive layout"],apiVersion:"1.10+",category:"Dashboard Extension",status:"development",color:"hsl(186, 72%, 37%)"},{id:"svg-image",href:"/extensions/svg-image",icon:O3,name:"SVG Image",tagline:"Custom SVG driven by live Tableau field values",description:"Paste any SVG markup and bind Tableau worksheet fields to {{placeholder}} tokens — just like building a Tableau tooltip.",features:["Paste any SVG","Field binding","Value formatting","Settings persist"],apiVersion:"1.1+",category:"Dashboard Extension",status:"development",color:"hsl(263, 70%, 58%)"},{id:"kpi-progress-bar",href:"/extensions/kpi-progress-bar",icon:Ex,name:"KPI Progress Bar",tagline:"Animated labelled progress bars from Tableau data",description:"Renders multiple KPI metrics as animated progress bars. Supports single, palette, and threshold (R/Y/G) color modes with label, value, and max controls.",features:["Animated bars","Threshold colors","Custom max","Label controls"],apiVersion:"1.1+",category:"Dashboard Extension",status:"development",color:"hsl(217, 91%, 60%)"},{id:"donut-chart",href:"/extensions/donut-chart",icon:S3,name:"Donut Chart",tagline:"D3-powered donut / pie chart with tooltips",description:"Interactive donut or pie chart driven by Tableau data. Toggle between pie and donut, choose from 5 palettes, and configure center labels, legends, and slice gaps.",features:["Pie or donut","5 palettes","Center label","Hover tooltips"],apiVersion:"1.1+",category:"Dashboard Extension",status:"development",color:"hsl(25, 95%, 53%)"},{id:"radar-chart",href:"/extensions/radar-chart",icon:N3,name:"Radar Chart",tagline:"Multi-series spider chart for dimension comparison",description:"A D3-powered radar/spider chart for comparing multiple series across common axes. Supports polygon or circle grids, fill opacity, dot markers, and multi-series legends.",features:["Multi-series","Polygon / circle grid","Dot markers","Normalize to max"],apiVersion:"1.1+",category:"Dashboard Extension",status:"development",color:"hsl(160, 84%, 39%)"},{id:"stream-graph",href:"/extensions/stream-graph",icon:C3,name:"Stream Graph",tagline:"Fluid stacked area stream chart for trends over time",description:"D3 stream graph with wiggle, silhouette, expand, and stacked offset modes. Supports smooth curves, series labels inside bands, and hover tooltips.",features:["Wiggle / expand","Smooth curves","Stream labels","Long & wide data"],apiVersion:"1.1+",category:"Dashboard Extension",status:"development",color:"hsl(189, 94%, 43%)"},{id:"kpi-card",href:"/extensions/kpi-card",icon:M3,name:"KPI Card",tagline:"Grid of styled metric cards with trend & target",description:"A responsive grid of KPI metric cards with trend arrows vs previous period, target progress bars, and four card styles. Perfect for executive dashboards.",features:["1–4 col grid","Trend arrows","Target progress","4 card styles"],apiVersion:"1.1+",category:"Dashboard Extension",status:"development",color:"hsl(330, 81%, 60%)"},{id:"force-network",href:"/extensions/force-network",icon:D3,name:"Force Network Graph",tagline:"Interactive D3 force-directed graph for relationships",description:"A fully interactive force-directed network graph. Drag nodes, scroll to zoom, configure repulsion, link distance, node shapes, and 5 color palettes.",features:["Draggable nodes","3 node shapes","Directed arrows","Zoom & pan"],apiVersion:"1.1+",category:"Dashboard Extension",status:"development",color:"hsl(263, 70%, 58%)"},{id:"chord-diagram",href:"/extensions/chord-diagram",icon:E3,name:"Chord Diagram",tagline:"Circular flow diagram for bidirectional relationships",description:"D3 chord diagram that visualizes bidirectional flows and magnitudes between groups. Configurable ribbon opacity, arc gap, group sorting, and value formatting.",features:["Bidirectional flows","Arc sorting","Tick marks","Hover tooltips"],apiVersion:"1.1+",category:"Dashboard Extension",status:"development",color:"hsl(348, 83%, 58%)"},{id:"tree-diagram",href:"/extensions/tree-diagram",icon:A3,name:"Tree Diagram",tagline:"D3 tidy tree for parent-child hierarchies",description:"A D3 tidy tree supporting Left→Right, Top→Bottom, and Radial orientations with elbow, smooth, and straight link styles. Color by depth or group.",features:["3 orientations","Color by depth","Elbow & smooth","Radial mode"],apiVersion:"1.1+",category:"Dashboard Extension",status:"development",color:"hsl(152, 69%, 40%)"},{id:"dendrogram",href:"/extensions/dendrogram",icon:P3,name:"Dendrogram",tagline:"Cluster dendrogram with aligned leaf nodes",description:"D3 cluster layout where all leaves align at the same depth — ideal for taxonomies and classification hierarchies. Supports radial, LR, and TB orientations.",features:["Leaf alignment","3 orientations","Group coloring","Distance bars"],apiVersion:"1.1+",category:"Dashboard Extension",status:"development",color:"hsl(38, 92%, 50%)"},{id:"ai-insights",href:"/extensions/ai-insights",icon:L3,name:"AI Insights",tagline:"Natural language Q&A over your worksheet data",description:"Ask plain-English questions about your Tableau data. Understands field names and values to answer ranking, trend, comparison, and share questions — all client-side, no external API.",features:["Natural language Q&A","Rankings & trends","Comparisons","Zero data egress"],apiVersion:"1.7+",category:"Viz Extension",status:"development",color:"hsl(263, 70%, 58%)"},{id:"hello-world",href:"/extensions/hello-world?view=admin",icon:F3,name:"Hello World",tagline:"The simplest possible Tableau Viz Extension",description:"A minimal animated greeting rendered inside a Tableau worksheet.
